left_comment: Any analysis performed over a sample.

left_comment: Document about improved mass spectral similarity scoring through learning of structural relationships. The spectral similarity score is based on spectral embeddings learnt from the fragmental relationships within a large set of spectral data. Analysis and benchmarking of mass spectra similarity measures using GNPS data set.
